name: Pronunciation
description: Pronunciation in IPA. May be a single string or split by part of speech.

all.description: IPA pronunciation that applies across all parts of speech.

noun.description: IPA pronunciation when the word is used as a noun.

verb.description: IPA pronunciation when the word is used as a verb.

adjective.description: IPA pronunciation when the word is used as an adjective.

adverb.description: IPA pronunciation when the word is used as an adverb.
